content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (like ICM from Topic A) can act as a dynamic pruning gate for 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory, only retaining traces of exploration that trigger intrinsic surprise rather than storing every interaction incrementally. This creates a 'curiosity-aligned memory budget' that avoids catastrophic forgetting of high-value novel experiences while preventing memory bloat from uninformative, repeated interactions.
